---
title: "UIAO Documentation"
subtitle: "Unified Identity-Addressing-Overlay Architecture"
---

Welcome to the UIAO documentation site.

UIAO turns a single YAML **Source of Truth** into FedRAMP-compliant OSCAL
artifacts, continuous KSI validation, and automated drift-to-POA&M workflows.

## Where to Start

- [Getting Started](01-getting-started.qmd) — install, first canon validate, first SSP render.
- Architecture: the six control planes and eight core concepts (coming from the `uiao-docs` migration).
- CLI reference: generated from `uiao --help`.

## Migration Notice

This documentation site is being migrated from the legacy `uiao-docs`
repository. Expect the full set of `.qmd` chapters to appear here as the
consolidation progresses.
